CheckTitle: Ensure at least one Conditional Access policy is fully enabled (not report-only)
Description: Verifies that at least one Conditional Access policy is in 'enabled' state. If all policies are in 'enabledForReportingButNotEnforced' (report-only) mode, no access controls are actually enforced.
Risk: Report-only policies log events but do not block or challenge sign-ins. An attacker can bypass all Conditional Access protections if no policy is enforced.

Remediation.Recommendation: Review report-only policies and transition critical ones (MFA, legacy auth block) to enabled state.

SourceNotes: AI-generated framework mappings — verify before citing in compliance reports.
